verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable first step immediately: “open the browser Network tab, reproduce, and count the outgoing requests”; A starts with “Good news” before getting there.
verdict.decisiveness: A is more directive with “Work it in this order” and “don't skip it,” while B gives the same split but moves into examples faster.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now: it gives the Network-tab split plus immediate checks like “getEventListeners(formEl)” and a tiny logging snippet without the longer diagnostic workflow.
